'''Durkish Corporation''' was a leading manufacturer of [[aural amplifier]]s during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Originally a maker of visual detection devices, it switched products in the belief that the respiratory sounds made by most creatures would be more perceptible and less easily disguised.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
